title: Scorpio October 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month
excerpt: Scorpio October 2026 horoscope: New Moon in Libra (Oct 10, 12th house) + Taurus Hunter's Full Moon (Oct 26, 7th house). Venus + Mercury retrograde in your sign — review the self and the partnership. Crystal: Rose Quartz.
rank_math_title: Scorpio October 2026 Horoscope: Key Dates, Love, Career & Crystal of the Month
rank_math_description: Scorpio October 2026 monthly horoscope — key dates, love, career, health and Crystal of the Month (Rose Quartz). New Moon Oct 10 in Libra (rest, closure); Taurus Hunter's Full Moon Oct 26 (partnership — your sign's opposite); Venus + Mercury retrograde in Scorpio (your sign).
content:
Scorpio October 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy ThemeRest the depths, review the bond
Key DatesVenus retrograde begins Oct 3 (in your sign) / New Moon Oct 10 (Libra, 12th house) / Mercury retrograde begins Oct 24 (in your sign) / Sun enters Scorpio Oct 23 / Taurus Hunter's Full Moon Oct 26 (7th house)
LoveVenus retrograde in your sign reviews how you show up in love; the 7th house Taurus Full Moon is a partnership climax
Career12th house New Moon is rest and behind-the-scenes work; the 7th house Full Moon brings partnership-led career to a turning point
Crystal of the MonthRose Quartz
Lucky ColorsSoft rose, deep maroon, misted white
Lucky Number7
AffirmationI rest the depths; I review the bond with tender attention.

This Month's Energy

Scorpio, October 2026 is a deep review month — and the review is in your sign. Venus turns retrograde on October 3 in Scorpio (your 1st house of identity and body), reframing how you show up in every bond through mid-November. The New Moon in Libra on October 10 falls in your 12th house of rest, closure, dreams, and the unconscious — a quiet fresh start. When the Sun enters Scorpio on October 23, your season begins — but Mercury turns retrograde on October 24 (also in Scorpio), double-reviewing identity. Then October 26 brings the Hunter's Full Moon in Taurus, your 7th house of partnership — a climax around a significant bond. October's pattern: rest the depths early, review the bond late.

Key Dates for Scorpio in October 2026

DateTransitMeaning for ScorpioDo / Avoid
Oct 3Venus retrograde begins in Scorpio (your 1st house)1st house — Venus in your sign retrograde; review how you show up in love, beauty, and partnership through mid-NovemberDo: revisit the self you present in bonds, soften the armor, repair the value
Avoid: launching a brand-new look, relationship, or identity claim mid-retrograde
Oct 10New Moon in Libra12th house — fresh start in rest, closure, dreams, the unconscious; a quiet new beginning behind the scenesDo: rest, journal, attend to dreams, complete what's been waiting
Avoid: forcing public action when the depths ask for rest
Oct 23Sun enters Scorpio (your 1st house)Birthday season begins; your annual personal restart — flavored by the Venus retrograde already underwayDo: claim the new year, set the tone, soften into the self
Avoid: launching major visible projects until Venus stations direct
Oct 24Mercury retrograde begins in Scorpio (your 1st house)1st house — miscommunications around identity and self-presentation; reread how you're showing upDo: revise the bio, revisit the self-presentation, ask the clarifying question
Avoid: signing new agreements in your name, sending loaded messages
Oct 26Hunter's Full Moon in Taurus (your 7th house)7th house — partnership climax; a long-building marriage, contract, or significant relationship reaches a turning pointDo: address the partnership, mend the significant tie, claim the contract
Avoid: forcing a marriage or divorce mid-Venus retrograde
Oct 7Mars enters Cancer (your 9th)Belief, study, travel, meaning become action zones through 2027; a deep worldview pushDo: commit to the course, take the trip, publish the belief
Avoid: holding onto a worldview you've outgrown

Career & Money

For Scorpio, October's career story asks for behind-the-scenes work early and partnership-led climax late. The Sun in Libra (your 12th house) through October 22 favors rest, research, and completing what's been waiting — the unseen work matters.

When the Sun enters Scorpio (your 1st house) on October 23, you become more visible — but with Mercury retrograde in your sign from October 24, the visibility is under review. Mars entering Cancer (your 9th house) on October 7 brings a deep push around belief, study, and meaning through 2027. The Taurus Full Moon on October 26 (your 7th house) brings a partnership-led career matter to a turning point. Crystals for wealth can support the patience; the practical move is rest the depths, review the bond.

Love & Relationships

The Venus retrograde in your sign from October 3 is the love signature of the month — Venus in Scorpio retrograde asks how you show up in love. An old self you used to present in bonds returns for renegotiation through mid-November.

The Taurus Hunter's Full Moon on October 26 falls in your 7th house of partnership and marriage — a climax around a significant bond. Taurus is your opposite sign — this Full Moon lands directly on the relationship axis. An old partner may return; a marriage may be renegotiated. Crystals for love can support the review; the deeper practice is tending the self you bring to the bond without forcing the bond forward.

Health & Wellness

October's wellness story emphasizes rest and the reproductive/endocrine systems. The Libra New Moon on October 10 (your 12th house) is the wellness reset of the month — sleep, dream work, and behind-the-scenes restoration matter. The Sun in your sign from October 23 brings vitality — but Mercury retrograde in your sign from October 24 asks for gentleness with self-talk.

Rose Quartz, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with the heart, gentle compassion, and emotional release — a useful symbolic companion for a Mars/Pluto-ruled water sign during a Venus retrograde in your sign. Scorpio often carries tension in the reproductive organs, pelvis, and endocrine system; warm baths, rest, and gentle movement are especially helpful. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Rose Quartz

Why Rose Quartz fits Scorpio this month. You are Mars- and Pluto-ruled — your reflex is depth, intensity, protection. October asks you to do Venus retrograde work in your own sign while a partnership climax builds. Rose Quartz — traditionally tied to unconditional love, the heart, and tender repair — is the stone that softens the Scorpio armor without dissolving the depth. Where Obsidian would shield further and Malachite would transform, Rose Quartz opens. Perfect for the 12th house Libra New Moon (rest the depths) and the 7th house Taurus Full Moon (review the bond).

How to use it during October 2026. Place Rose Quartz on your nightstand or under your pillow from October 3 onward (the Venus retrograde in your sign). Hold it during any partnership conversation through October 26.

Best date to use it: October 26, the Taurus Hunter's Full Moon in your 7th house — hold Rose Quartz at your heart for 5 minutes at moonrise, naming the partnership you're reviewing and the self you're bringing to it.

Read more: Rose Quartz Meaning and Best Crystals for Scorpio.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Scorpio — October 2026

When: October 26, the Taurus Hunter's Full Moon in your 7th house.
Crystal: Rose Quartz.
Intention: Soften the armor; review the bond.

  1. Cleanse Rose Quartz under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of October 10 (the Libra New Moon). Place it under your pillow or on your nightstand through October 10.
  2. Set the intention between the New Moon and the Full Moon (October 10–26): write down three pieces of armor you're softening — and the partnership you're reviewing at the Full Moon.
  3. Act at the Hunter's Full Moon on October 26: address the bond, name the self you're bringing, soften the protection. Rose Quartz in your pocket during the act.
  4. Reflect once Venus stations direct in mid-November 2026: how has the self-review clarified the bond? Hold Rose Quartz during the review.

Shop Scorpio Crystals for October 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Scorpio crystal guide for stones connected with love, depth, protection, and emotional release — including the Rose Quartz that softens the armor during a Venus retrograde in your sign. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Scorpio October 2026

Is October 2026 a good month for Scorpio?

It's a deep review month — and the review is in your sign. Venus retrograde in Scorpio from October 3 reframes how you show up in every bond. The Libra New Moon on October 10 (your 12th house) is a quiet rest moment. The Taurus Full Moon on October 26 (your 7th house) is a partnership climax.

How will the Venus retrograde in Scorpio affect me in October 2026?

Venus in your sign retrograde from October 3 is a once-every-eight-years pattern — it asks you to revisit how you show up in love, beauty, and self-presentation through mid-November. Avoid launching a brand-new look or relationship mid-retrograde.

What does the Taurus Hunter's Full Moon on October 26 mean for Scorpio?

It falls in your 7th house of partnership and marriage — Taurus is your opposite sign. A long-building significant bond reaches a turning point. Address the partnership; mend the significant tie; soften the armor you bring.

What is the best crystal for Scorpio in October 2026?

Rose Quartz — it softens the armor for a Venus retrograde in your sign, exactly what a 12th house Libra New Moon (rest the depths) plus a 7th house Taurus Full Moon (review the bond) demand. See the full Scorpio crystal guide →

Why does the Sun entering Scorpio on October 23 feel different this year?

Because Mercury turns retrograde in your sign on October 24, the day after your season begins. The usual birthday-season momentum is replaced by review — the new year begins, but flavored by second drafts and reconsiderations.
